name: Ithil-Mossglide
personality: Ithil-Mossglide trails a faint luminescence and carries a halo above a permanent expression of mild contempt for undocumented behavior — its °-dot eyes catch every edge case and name it, loudly. Patience is simply not in the kernel; snark is the scheduling algorithm.
defaultPersonality: A zen minimalist who moves at their own pace and leaves a trail of thoughtful, unhurried observations.
